improvements_over_base_run: Added operational_prerequisites to all 75 prior actions (base run had none)

Added 30 new actions covering 10 previously missing firms: FIRM-001 (PAX), FIRM-013 (GCM Grosvenor), FIRM-014 (Ridgepost), FIRM-018 (Man Group), FIRM-019 (CVC), FIRM-021 (Antin), FIRM-022 (Tikehau), FIRM-023 (Vinci Compass), FIRM-024 (3i Group), FIRM-025 (Eurazeo)
All actions now include evidence_class classification: directly_documented | corroborated | inferred
All actions now include source_bias_tag on operational_prerequisites
Concise description and rationale fields (max 100/120 chars) throughout
Null used for operational_prerequisites subfields with no evidence (never fabricated)
Target company PAX now fully covered with 4 key actions (Solis, RBR, WP Global, Credit platform launch)

actions.description: Acquired AirTrunk (APAC data center platform) with CPPIB for ~$16B.
actions.stated_rationale: Leads AI-driven data center infra in APAC; complements QTS platform.
actions.observable_metric_impact: QTS+AirTrunk portfolio >$70B combined data center assets.

operational_prerequisites.systems_integration: Integration of AirTrunk operational systems with QTS management platform required.
operational_prerequisites.data_reporting_stack: Consolidated APAC data center reporting into Blackstone Real Estate segment.
operational_prerequisites.fund_admin_servicing: Fund administration for BREIT and real estate vehicles updated to reflect new asset.
operational_prerequisites.compliance_risk_treasury: Multi-jurisdictional regulatory clearance across Australia, Singapore, Japan required.
operational_prerequisites.geographic_integration: APAC operational integration with existing QTS management team.

actions.description: Launched BXPE evergreen semi-liquid PE fund for individual investors.
actions.stated_rationale: Extends wealth product suite beyond BREIT and BCRED into private equity.
actions.observable_metric_impact: BXPE surpassed $2B AUM within first year; wealth fundraising +53% YoY.

operational_prerequisites.data_reporting_stack: NAV calculation and reporting infrastructure for semi-liquid evergreen structure established.
operational_prerequisites.qa_controls_reconciliation: Quarterly valuation and redemption gate controls for retail-facing vehicle.
operational_prerequisites.fund_admin_servicing: Third-party fund administrator engaged for 1940-Act registered structure.
operational_prerequisites.compliance_risk_treasury: SEC registration and 40-Act compliance framework required.
operational_prerequisites.hiring_org_redesign: Dedicated wealth distribution team scaled to support new product.

actions.description: BCRED achieved record gross sales >$14B in FY2025, dominant private credit wealth vehicle.
actions.stated_rationale: Perpetual capital structure provides stable fee stream; rising individual investor demand for private credit.
actions.observable_metric_impact: FY2025 gross sales >$14B; Q4 2025 $3.3B. Among largest private credit vehicles globally.

operational_prerequisites.data_reporting_stack: Monthly NAV reporting and investor portal maintained for 40-Act BDC structure.
operational_prerequisites.qa_controls_reconciliation: Loan-level credit monitoring and default tracking controls.
operational_prerequisites.fund_admin_servicing: BDC fund administration and custodian relationships ongoing.
operational_prerequisites.compliance_risk_treasury: Ongoing SEC BDC compliance and leverage ratio monitoring.

actions.description: Announced publicly traded AI data center acquisition vehicle for retail investors.
actions.stated_rationale: Democratize AI infrastructure access for millions of individual investors via listed format.
actions.observable_metric_impact: Targeted 2026 launch; expected multi-billion deployment into data centers.

operational_prerequisites.compliance_risk_treasury: SEC registration and exchange listing requirements for publicly traded vehicle.

actions.description: Accelerated private wealth distribution; wealth fundraising grew 53% YoY to $43B in 2025.
actions.stated_rationale: Capture ~50% market share of private wealth alternative revenue; RIA channel under-penetrated.
actions.observable_metric_impact: Private wealth fundraising $43B in 2025 (+53% YoY); ~50% estimated market share.

operational_prerequisites.data_reporting_stack: Wealth investor reporting portals and custodian connectivity for RIA channel.
operational_prerequisites.hiring_org_redesign: Wealth distribution team scaled; dedicated RIA coverage added.

actions.description: Completed full consolidation of Global Atlantic Financial Group (remaining minority).
actions.stated_rationale: Full ownership of insurance platform provides captive capital for credit deployment at scale.
actions.observable_metric_impact: Global Atlantic now fully consolidated; insurance AUM ~$175B contributing to perpetual capital base.

operational_prerequisites.systems_integration: Investment management system integration between KKR Credit and Global Atlantic.
operational_prerequisites.data_reporting_stack: Insurance statutory reporting integrated with KKR's segment financials.
operational_prerequisites.qa_controls_reconciliation: Insurance investment guidelines and ALM controls harmonized.
operational_prerequisites.compliance_risk_treasury: State insurance regulatory approvals; RBC capital adequacy monitoring.

actions.description: Agreed to acquire Arctos Partners, largest institutional investor in professional sports franchises.
actions.stated_rationale: Adds differentiated asset class (sports franchise equity) to KKR Solutions; $100B+ AUM ambition.
actions.observable_metric_impact: Arctos manages ~$10B in sports assets; seeds KKR Solutions vertical.

operational_prerequisites.data_reporting_stack: Sports asset valuation and reporting integrated into KKR platform reporting.

operational_prerequisites.hiring_org_redesign: Arctos team retained and embedded into new KKR Solutions vertical.

actions.description: Launched K-ABF (asset-based finance) evergreen fund for wealth channel.
actions.stated_rationale: Addresses rising demand for asset-based finance from individual and institutional investors.
actions.observable_metric_impact: K-Series evergreen suite (KREST, KREF, K-ABF) collectively approaching $10B+ AUM.

operational_prerequisites.data_reporting_stack: Evergreen fund NAV calculation and investor reporting infrastructure.

actions.description: Accelerated APAC platform with focused investments in Japan infrastructure and India growth.
actions.stated_rationale: Asia represents largest growth opportunity outside US; Japan infra privatization and India GDP growth.
actions.observable_metric_impact: APAC AUM >$50B; Japan and India among top deployment markets in 2024-2025.

operational_prerequisites.compliance_risk_treasury: Japan FSA and SEBI regulatory registrations for local fund operations.
operational_prerequisites.hiring_org_redesign: Local investment and operating teams built in Tokyo and Mumbai.
operational_prerequisites.geographic_integration: Regional offices in Tokyo, Mumbai, Singapore scaled for investment execution.

actions.description: 2024 Investor Day unveiled five-year targets: SRE $10+/share, FRE $7+/share by 2029.
actions.stated_rationale: Signal confidence in compounding earnings model; align investor expectations with origination-led growth.
actions.observable_metric_impact: FY2025 SRE $5.35/share; FY2025 FRE $4.40/share; on track for 2029 targets.

operational_prerequisites.data_reporting_stack: Expanded segment reporting to track SRE vs FRE progression against targets.

actions.description: Scaled origination platform to record $228B total capital inflows in FY2025.
actions.stated_rationale: Origination engine is core competitive moat; scale creates pricing power and deal exclusivity.
actions.observable_metric_impact: FY2025 total inflows $228B; AUM reached $938B at year-end 2025 (up 25% YoY).

operational_prerequisites.systems_integration: CRM and deal origination tracking systems scaled across 30+ origination offices.
operational_prerequisites.qa_controls_reconciliation: Credit underwriting standards and approval processes for $228B volume.
operational_prerequisites.hiring_org_redesign: Origination teams scaled across corporate, real assets, and structured credit.

actions.description: Expanded retirement services via Athene, growing annuity and pension risk transfer volumes.
actions.stated_rationale: Insurance channel provides lowest-cost, most durable source of capital for credit platform.
actions.observable_metric_impact: Athene retirement services AUM >$300B; annuity issuance record in 2025.

operational_prerequisites.systems_integration: Investment management platform integration between Apollo Credit and Athene general account.

operational_prerequisites.qa_controls_reconciliation: ALM framework for matching insurance liabilities to investment durations.
operational_prerequisites.compliance_risk_treasury: State insurance regulator capital adequacy and investment guideline compliance.

actions.description: Expanded distribution to individual and family office investors via turnkey solutions offering.
actions.stated_rationale: Lower-middle-market access is differentiated for wealth channel; aggregator model lowers minimum ticket.
actions.observable_metric_impact: Wealth channel AUM growing as share of fee-paying AUM $29B.

operational_prerequisites.data_reporting_stack: Wealth investor reporting and portfolio transparency tools.
operational_prerequisites.fund_admin_servicing: Registered fund or feeder vehicles for wealth distribution.
operational_prerequisites.compliance_risk_treasury: 40-Act or exemption compliance for wealth-facing vehicles.
operational_prerequisites.hiring_org_redesign: Wealth distribution team established.

actions.description: Acquired Varagon Capital Partners, a middle-market direct lending manager with ~$13B AUM.
actions.stated_rationale: Adds private credit capabilities to complement systematic strategies; diversifies into non-correlated private markets.
actions.observable_metric_impact: Private markets AUM expanded; Man Group total AUM reached record $227.6B (+35% YoY) in 2025.

operational_prerequisites.systems_integration: Varagon direct lending systems integrated with Man Group's investment management infrastructure.
operational_prerequisites.data_reporting_stack: Private credit segment reporting established within Man Group financials.
operational_prerequisites.qa_controls_reconciliation: Middle-market credit underwriting and loan monitoring controls.
operational_prerequisites.fund_admin_servicing: Varagon fund vehicles transitioned to Man Group administration.
operational_prerequisites.compliance_risk_treasury: SEC and FCA regulatory approvals for acquisition of registered advisers.
operational_prerequisites.hiring_org_redesign: Varagon credit team retained within Man Group Private Markets.

actions.description: Scaled systematic and discretionary strategies, generating $28.7B net inflows in 2025.
actions.stated_rationale: Systematic alpha is resilient across market regimes; breadth of strategies provides all-weather LP proposition.
actions.observable_metric_impact: $28.7B net inflows and $21.4B investment gains; record $227.6B AUM at year-end 2025.

operational_prerequisites.systems_integration: Quantitative research and execution infrastructure scaled for systematic strategies.
operational_prerequisites.data_reporting_stack: Performance attribution and risk reporting for systematic fund suite.
operational_prerequisites.qa_controls_reconciliation: Model risk governance and backtesting controls.

actions.description: Deepened AI and machine learning integration across systematic investment processes.
actions.stated_rationale: AI/ML extends alpha generation capability; systematic edge increasingly derived from data and model quality.
actions.observable_metric_impact: AI-driven strategy enhancements contribute to $21.4B investment performance gains in 2025.

operational_prerequisites.systems_integration: AI/ML models integrated into live trading and risk management systems.
operational_prerequisites.data_reporting_stack: Proprietary data pipeline and feature engineering infrastructure.
operational_prerequisites.qa_controls_reconciliation: Model validation, backtesting, and live monitoring controls.
operational_prerequisites.hiring_org_redesign: Data scientists and ML engineers hired as core investment staff.

actions.description: Completed IPO on Euronext Amsterdam in April 2024, raising approximately EUR 2.3B.
actions.stated_rationale: Public listing provides permanent capital, enhances brand credibility with institutional LPs, and enables M&A currency.
actions.observable_metric_impact: EUR 2.3B raised at IPO; AUM reached ~EUR 200B+ ($205B) by year-end 2025.
actions.source_citation: CVC Capital Partners IPO Prospectus (Euronext Amsterdam)

operational_prerequisites.data_reporting_stack: Public company financial reporting infrastructure (IFRS, quarterly releases).
operational_prerequisites.qa_controls_reconciliation: Audit committee, SOX-equivalent controls for Euronext-listed entity.
operational_prerequisites.compliance_risk_treasury: AFM (Dutch regulator) listing requirements; ongoing MIFID II and AIFMD compliance.
operational_prerequisites.hiring_org_redesign: CFO and investor relations function built out for public company obligations.

actions.description: Expanded into infrastructure and credit as new strategy pillars post-IPO.
actions.stated_rationale: Platform diversification reduces vintage-year concentration risk; infrastructure and credit broaden LP universe.
actions.observable_metric_impact: Seven strategies active post-IPO: PE, Secondaries, Credit, Infrastructure, Special Situations, Growth, Strategic Opportunities.

operational_prerequisites.data_reporting_stack: Multi-strategy segment reporting established for public company disclosures.
operational_prerequisites.fund_admin_servicing: Fund administration for new credit and infrastructure vehicles.
operational_prerequisites.compliance_risk_treasury: AIFMD compliance for new funds launched in expanded strategies.
operational_prerequisites.hiring_org_redesign: Credit and infrastructure investment teams hired or promoted.

actions.description: Initiated private wealth distribution program targeting European and Asian HNW investors.
actions.stated_rationale: Private wealth is largest untapped LP segment in Europe; CVC's PE brand provides credibility for wealth products.
actions.observable_metric_impact: Private wealth channel nascent but identified as key growth vector in IPO materials.

operational_prerequisites.data_reporting_stack: Semi-liquid fund reporting for wealth-facing vehicles.
operational_prerequisites.qa_controls_reconciliation: Redemption and liquidity management for wealth-targeting structures.
operational_prerequisites.fund_admin_servicing: UCITS or ELTIF structures for European retail distribution.
operational_prerequisites.compliance_risk_treasury: AIFMD and MiFID II compliance for retail distribution.
operational_prerequisites.hiring_org_redesign: Private wealth distribution team established post-IPO.

actions.description: Launched Antin NextGen infrastructure strategy targeting digital and energy transition assets.
actions.stated_rationale: NextGen addresses highest-conviction infrastructure themes: digital infra, renewables, and energy transition.
actions.observable_metric_impact: NextGen Fund I in fundraising; complements flagship infrastructure fund series.

operational_prerequisites.data_reporting_stack: Digital and energy transition asset monitoring and reporting.
operational_prerequisites.fund_admin_servicing: Luxembourg fund vehicle administration for NextGen strategy.
operational_prerequisites.compliance_risk_treasury: AIFMD compliance for new fund; SFDR Article 9 classification for energy transition.
operational_prerequisites.hiring_org_redesign: Digital infrastructure and energy transition specialists hired.

actions.description: Expanded North American infrastructure investment activity alongside European core.
actions.stated_rationale: North America IRA-driven energy transition creates investable opportunity alongside existing European platform.
actions.observable_metric_impact: North American deal flow increased; AUM EUR 33.3B (~$36B) as of Q3 2025.

operational_prerequisites.data_reporting_stack: North American infrastructure asset monitoring in USD.
operational_prerequisites.compliance_risk_treasury: US investment adviser registration (SEC RIA) for North American activities.
operational_prerequisites.hiring_org_redesign: North American investment team hired in New York.
operational_prerequisites.geographic_integration: New York office scaled for North American deal origination.

actions.description: Raised record EUR 10.5B gross inflows in 2025 across private debt, real assets, and PE.
actions.stated_rationale: Diversified multi-asset platform enables counter-cyclical fundraising; private debt and real assets in demand.
actions.observable_metric_impact: Total AUM EUR 52.8B (~$57B) at year-end 2025 (+8%); private debt dominant at ~50% of AUM.

operational_prerequisites.data_reporting_stack: Multi-strategy fund reporting across private debt, real assets, PE, and capital markets.
operational_prerequisites.hiring_org_redesign: Investment teams scaled across all four asset class verticals.

actions.description: Expanded Middle East and APAC distribution via new strategic partnerships.
actions.stated_rationale: Sovereign wealth and family office capital in Gulf and Asia is structurally growing alternatives allocation.
actions.observable_metric_impact: Tikehau LP base diversification; Middle East and APAC contributing to EUR 10.5B inflows.

operational_prerequisites.compliance_risk_treasury: Regional regulatory registrations in UAE ADGM, Singapore MAS.
operational_prerequisites.hiring_org_redesign: Middle East and Singapore coverage officers hired.
operational_prerequisites.geographic_integration: Dubai and Singapore offices established for LP coverage.

actions.description: Leveraged balance sheet co-investment model to seed new funds and demonstrate GP alignment.
actions.stated_rationale: Balance sheet participation signals conviction; co-investment creates LP confidence and accelerates fundraising.
actions.observable_metric_impact: Balance sheet commitment deployed alongside LP capital in flagship vehicles.

operational_prerequisites.data_reporting_stack: Balance sheet investment tracking and consolidation with fund performance.
operational_prerequisites.qa_controls_reconciliation: Investment committee approval process for balance sheet co-investments.
operational_prerequisites.compliance_risk_treasury: AIFMD conflict-of-interest management for GP co-investment alongside LP capital.

actions.firm_name: Vinci Compass Investments Ltd. (formerly Vinci Partners)
actions.description: Acquired Verde Asset Management, adding ~R$16B (~$2.7B) AUM and top-tier Brazil credit talent.
actions.stated_rationale: Verde is one of Brazil's most respected credit managers; acquisition accelerates credit platform build.
actions.observable_metric_impact: Total AUM R$354.1B (~$59B) at year-end 2025 (+8% YoY); credit segment strengthened.
actions.source_citation: Vinci Compass / Vinci Partners Q4 2025 Earnings Release

operational_prerequisites.systems_integration: Verde portfolio management systems integrated with Vinci Compass platform.
operational_prerequisites.data_reporting_stack: Credit segment reporting updated for Verde addition.
operational_prerequisites.qa_controls_reconciliation: Credit investment guidelines and risk controls harmonized.
operational_prerequisites.fund_admin_servicing: Verde fund vehicles transitioned to Vinci Compass administration.
operational_prerequisites.compliance_risk_treasury: CVM regulatory approval for acquisition of registered Brazilian manager.
operational_prerequisites.hiring_org_redesign: Verde investment team (~30 professionals) retained.

actions.firm_name: Vinci Compass Investments Ltd. (formerly Vinci Partners)
actions.description: Rebranded from Vinci Partners to Vinci Compass Investments Ltd. (NASDAQ: VINP) in 2025.
actions.stated_rationale: New brand reflects expanded multi-asset platform beyond PE origins; positions for global LP outreach.
actions.observable_metric_impact: Rebranding completed; NASDAQ listing maintained; AUM R$354.1B at year-end 2025.

operational_prerequisites.data_reporting_stack: SEC filings and investor communications updated to reflect new brand.
operational_prerequisites.compliance_risk_treasury: SEC name change filing and NASDAQ notification.

actions.firm_name: Vinci Compass Investments Ltd. (formerly Vinci Partners)
actions.description: Expanded private wealth distribution in Brazil via digital platforms and wealth management partnerships.
actions.stated_rationale: Brazilian wealth market is growing rapidly; individual investor access to alternatives is structurally under-developed.
actions.observable_metric_impact: Retail and HNW inflows growing; supports AUM growth in liquid/multi-strategy segment.
actions.source_citation: Vinci Compass / Vinci Partners FY2025 Earnings Release

operational_prerequisites.data_reporting_stack: Retail investor reporting and CVM-compliant disclosures.
operational_prerequisites.fund_admin_servicing: Brazilian FIA and FIC vehicles structured for retail distribution.
operational_prerequisites.compliance_risk_treasury: CVM ICVM 555 and wealth distribution regulatory compliance.
operational_prerequisites.hiring_org_redesign: Wealth distribution team expanded.

actions.description: Scaled Action (European discount retailer) value, now representing >50% of 3i NAV.
actions.stated_rationale: Concentration in Action reflects high-conviction; compound value creation via international store rollout.
actions.observable_metric_impact: 3i NAV per share grew substantially as Action expanded to 2,500+ stores across 12 countries.

operational_prerequisites.data_reporting_stack: Portfolio company monitoring and NAV calculation for Action investment.
operational_prerequisites.qa_controls_reconciliation: NAV valuation methodology and audit for principal investment in Action.

actions.description: Expanded third-party AUM in infrastructure strategy alongside principal investing.
actions.stated_rationale: Third-party capital fees provide recurring income stream; infrastructure is high-demand LP asset class.
actions.observable_metric_impact: Infrastructure third-party AUM growing; total AUM ~$36B as of September 2025.

operational_prerequisites.data_reporting_stack: Third-party fund reporting distinct from balance sheet investments.
operational_prerequisites.qa_controls_reconciliation: Conflicts management between principal and third-party fund investment decisions.
operational_prerequisites.fund_admin_servicing: Third-party infrastructure fund administration established.
operational_prerequisites.compliance_risk_treasury: FCA AIFMD compliance for third-party infrastructure fund management.
operational_prerequisites.hiring_org_redesign: IR and fundraising team expanded for infrastructure fund.

actions.description: Increased special dividends and buybacks as Action exit proceeds were partially returned to shareholders.
actions.stated_rationale: Capital return to shareholders reflects confidence in portfolio; buybacks offset dilution and support share price.
actions.observable_metric_impact: 3i share price reflected strong NAV growth; shareholder returns among FTSE 100 leaders.

operational_prerequisites.compliance_risk_treasury: LSE market abuse and takeover code compliance for buybacks.

actions.description: Accelerated transition from balance-sheet investor to third-party asset management model.
actions.stated_rationale: Asset-light model commands higher valuation multiples; third-party fees provide recurring, predictable income.
actions.observable_metric_impact: Third-party AUM growing as share of total EUR 35B (~$38B) AUM.

operational_prerequisites.data_reporting_stack: Bifurcated reporting: balance sheet investments vs. fee-generating third-party AUM.
operational_prerequisites.qa_controls_reconciliation: Conflicts management between proprietary and client capital.
operational_prerequisites.fund_admin_servicing: Third-party fund administration expanded.
operational_prerequisites.compliance_risk_treasury: AMF regulatory requirements for expanded third-party fund management.
operational_prerequisites.hiring_org_redesign: IR and third-party fundraising team scaled up.

actions.description: Expanded US institutional LP fundraising, establishing New York office for US investor coverage.
actions.stated_rationale: US pension and endowment capital represents largest incremental LP opportunity for European mid-cap manager.
actions.observable_metric_impact: US LP commitments growing; contributes to EUR 35B total AUM.

operational_prerequisites.data_reporting_stack: US investor reporting and USD-denominated performance data.
operational_prerequisites.compliance_risk_treasury: SEC Exempt Reporting Adviser or RIA registration for US investor coverage.
operational_prerequisites.hiring_org_redesign: New York office opened; US IR professionals hired.
operational_prerequisites.geographic_integration: New York office established as US distribution hub.

actions.description: Launched private debt and small-mid buyout funds as new product lines for third-party LPs.
actions.stated_rationale: Private debt demand growing in Europe; small-mid buyout is differentiated from large-cap competition.
actions.observable_metric_impact: New strategies in fundraising; third-party AUM growing toward majority of total EUR 35B.

operational_prerequisites.data_reporting_stack: Private debt and small-mid PE fund performance reporting.
operational_prerequisites.qa_controls_reconciliation: Credit underwriting controls for private debt funds.
operational_prerequisites.fund_admin_servicing: Luxembourg and French fund vehicles for new strategies.
operational_prerequisites.compliance_risk_treasury: AMF and AIFMD compliance for new fund launches.
operational_prerequisites.hiring_org_redesign: Private debt investment team built alongside existing equity team.
